Class NetBeansAgiConfig

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.AgiConfig
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.SwingAgiConfig
uno.anahata.asi.nb.NetBeansAgiConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class NetBeansAgiConfig extends SwingAgiConfig
NetBeans-specific agi configuration. It replaces the core Files toolkit with the IDE-integrated NbFiles and adds NetBeans-specific toolkits like Maven, Projects, and CodeModel.

It also configures the NetBeansIconProvider to display authentic IDE icons in the context hierarchy.

Author:
anahata

    setHostedToolsEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Configures the session to utilize hosted server-side tools (e.g., Google Search).

    Sets whether thoughts should be included and fires a property change event.
    void
    setLocalToolsEnabled(boolean enabled)
    Configures the session to utilize local Java-based toolkits.

  • Method Details

    • createResourceHandle

      public ResourceHandle createResourceHandle(URI uri)
      Creates a specialized ResourceHandle based on the URI scheme.

      Supports 'file' schemes via PathHandle and fallbacks to UrlHandle for remote resources.

      Overrides the factory to return the reactive NbHandle for local or JAR resources.

      Overrides:
      createResourceHandle in class AgiConfig
      Parameters:
      uri - The resource URI to wrap.
      Returns:
      A concrete handle implementation for the specified URI.
